title: Esplanade Feed — Wanted Board Seed Data
description: Pre-seeded wanted board items for Virtual Black Rock City, organized by 6 BRC department cluster categories. Federation-ready for DoltHub sync.

categories.name: Skill Requests
categories.description: Requests for new skill development or existing skill enhancement

categories.name: Camp Help
categories.description: Theme camps seeking members, builders, or operational support

categories.name: Art Proposals
categories.description: Emergent art installation ideas seeking collaborators

categories.name: Civic Needs
categories.description: Infrastructure and civic roles seeking qualified volunteers

categories.name: Learning
categories.description: Teaching and learning opportunities — mentorship, workshops, knowledge exchange

categories.name: Transport
categories.description: Mobile chipset missions — cross-city deliveries, relay runs, survey flights

seed_items.title: Build a salmon upstream routing skill for dependency chain navigation
seed_items.description: Need a skill that traces dependency chains upstream — given a skill, find everything it depends on, all the way to the root. Named for the salmon that always knows the way home.

seed_items.title: Cedar Grove needs structural builders for camp scaffolding system
seed_items.description: Cedar Grove camp is building a modular scaffolding system for rapid camp deployment. Need volunteers who understand structural patterns and can work with camp schema definitions.

seed_items.title: Mycorrhizal Mandala sighting — 3 camps sharing knowledge thread
seed_items.description: Three camps (Cedar Grove, Raven's Roost, Salmon Run Camp) have independently developed skills that share a common knowledge pattern. Looking for collaborators to document this emergent Mycorrhizal Mandala installation.

seed_items.title: Watershed Watch needs overnight patrol volunteers
seed_items.description: Rangers needed for overnight safety patrols. Must be Level 2+ with understanding of de-escalation patterns. Training provided by Watershed Command.

seed_items.title: Learn how CEDAR chipset activation profiles work — workshop at Old Growth
seed_items.description: Old Growth Assembly is hosting a workshop on CEDAR chipset profiles (Scout through Fleet). Open to all trust levels. Bring questions about chip activation, profile switching, and multi-chip coordination.

seed_items.title: Raven Crawler relay mission — carry broadcast signal between Osprey Watch and Tide Pool
seed_items.description: Need a Raven Crawler to establish persistent signal relay between Osprey Watch camp and Tide Pool Collective. Critical for census data reaching emergency services.

seed_items.title: Design a canopy-gap detection skill for identifying deprecated skill opportunities
seed_items.description: When a skill is deprecated (Canopy Break archetype), the gap creates an opportunity for new growth. Need a skill that detects these gaps and suggests what could grow there.

seed_items.title: Tide Pool Collective seeking medical training volunteers
seed_items.description: Tide Pool Collective is expanding its medical response capability. Looking for volunteers interested in learning emergency protocols. No prior experience needed — training provided.

seed_items.title: Nurse Log emerging between Cedar Grove and Old Growth Assembly
seed_items.description: A Cedar Grove build skill is combining with an Old Growth Archive skill in a way that looks like a Nurse Log pattern — structured decay seeding new growth. Need observers and documenters.

seed_items.title: Columbia Gate needs identity verification system review
seed_items.description: Columbia Gate's rig identity validation needs review and stress testing. Must be Level 3 with understanding of security patterns. SC-02 compliance verification.

seed_items.title: Teach PNW taxonomy naming conventions — Raven's Roost workshop
seed_items.description: Learn how Virtual BRC maps PNW species and ecological features to skill names. Workshop covers naming glossary, source taxonomy, and how to choose names for new skills.

seed_items.title: Orca Sled expedition — full-chipset survey of outer playa
seed_items.description: Orca Sled expedition to survey the deep-playa zone beyond the city perimeter. Full Fleet activation, 8 chips, deep-water traversal. Need experienced crew for multi-day mission.

seed_items.title: Build a stamp verification skill for Yearbook Rule enforcement
seed_items.description: SC-05 requires that rigs cannot stamp their own work. Need a verification skill that automatically detects and rejects self-stamping attempts.

seed_items.title: Raven's Roost needs broadcast schedule coordinator
seed_items.description: Raven Broadcast runs a daily signal relay schedule. Need someone to coordinate broadcast timing across all camps, manage the relay chain, and ensure no gaps in coverage.

seed_items.title: Fire Succession pattern emerging after deprecated skill removal
seed_items.description: After Restoration Pass completed a major skill deprecation, new growth is appearing in the cleared namespace. Looks like a Fire Succession archetype. Seeking documenters and analysts.

seed_items.title: Restoration Pass needs LNT verification volunteers
seed_items.description: Restoration Pass is running dependency scans on skills scheduled for deprecation. Need volunteers trained in dependency analysis and reference tracing. Training available.

seed_items.title: Introduction to mobile chipset piloting — Chinook Rider training
seed_items.description: Learn to pilot the Chinook Rider — the workhorse vehicle of the fleet. Workshop covers SALMON + CEDAR + HEMLOCK chip coordination, upstream navigation, and heavy-load transport.

seed_items.title: Osprey Dive precision survey of Fireline Cedar camp boundaries
seed_items.description: Fireline Cedar needs precise boundary mapping before next burn event. Osprey Dive precision survey requested — minimal footprint, targeted aerial observation.

seed_items.title: Create a geoduck persistence metric for deep-rooted skills
seed_items.description: The geoduck burrows so deep it can never be moved. Need a metric that identifies skills with 'geoduck depth' — so deeply integrated that removing them would require rebuilding entire camps.

seed_items.title: Mycorrhizal Hub seeking co-learning session facilitators
seed_items.description: Mycorrhizal Hub runs cross-camp learning sessions where knowledge transfers through the network. Need facilitators comfortable with group dynamics and knowledge mapping.

seed_items.title: Salmon Ladder emerging — dependency chain visualization
seed_items.description: A navigation pattern showing the upstream path through complex skill dependencies is taking shape. Looks like the Salmon Ladder archetype. Need collaborators from Salmon Run Camp and Osprey Watch.

seed_items.title: Cascade Brigade recruiting for city build/strike season
seed_items.description: DPW is preparing for a major build cycle. Need volunteers for infrastructure construction, camp activation validation, and strike coordination. Physical infrastructure work.

seed_items.title: Advanced stamp ecology workshop — understanding mycorrhizal mark patterns
seed_items.description: Deep dive into stamp type ecology: when to give spore-marks vs root-depth, how stamp patterns reveal community health, and why the anti-commodification principle matters.

seed_items.title: Chinook Rider convoy — heavy materials transport to all 8 camps
seed_items.description: Multi-stop delivery run carrying infrastructure materials to all 8 camp clusters. Need 3 Chinook Riders for convoy — SALMON + CEDAR + HEMLOCK coordination required.

seed_items.title: Build a raven-mirror communication reflection skill
seed_items.description: The Raven Mirror art archetype reflects communication back — showing what you actually sent vs what you intended. Need a skill that provides this feedback loop for inter-camp messages.

seed_items.title: Osprey Watch needs aerial survey data analysts
seed_items.description: Census data is coming in from Osprey Survey flights. Need analysts to process population data, identify trends, and produce reports for city planning.

seed_items.title: Estuary formation — skill ecosystem meets Wasteland economy
seed_items.description: The boundary between the virtual BRC skill ecosystem and the broader Wasteland economy is crystallizing into a visible pattern. This looks like the Estuary archetype. Need senior rigs to document.

seed_items.title: Geoduck Watch needs environmental monitors for MOOP sweeps
seed_items.description: Regular MOOP (Matter Out Of Place) sweeps needed across all camp zones. Training provided — learn to identify orphaned resources, stale references, and environmental debris.

seed_items.title: History of Virtual BRC — Raven Archive storytelling session
seed_items.description: Raven Archive is hosting an oral history session. Come share your experience in the virtual city — what you built, what surprised you, what burned. All trust levels welcome.

seed_items.title: Raven Crawler rapid-relay network mapping between all civic agents
seed_items.description: Establish and map a rapid-relay communication network connecting all 6 civic agent stations. Raven Crawler fleet needed for multi-hop signal routing survey.

federation.sync_behavior: Sovereign databases with common schema; regional boards sync skill definitions while maintaining local wanted items
